chapter_title.ar: باب فَرْضِ الزَّكَاةِ وَ مَا يَجِبُ فِي الْمَالِ مِنَ الْحُقُوقِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 1 – The Obligation of Zakāt, and what is Obligated in the wealth, from the rights

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/12)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/12)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ إِنْ تُخْفُوها وَ تُؤْتُوهَا الْفُقَراءَ فَهُوَ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ فَقَالَ هِيَ سِوَى الزَّكَاةِ إِنَّ الزَّكَاةَ عَلَانِيَةٌ غَيْرُ سِرٍّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [2:271] If you give alms openly, it is good, and if you hide it and give it to the poor, it is better for you. So heasws said: ‘It is besides the Zakāt. The (giving) of Zakāt is publicly, without being secretive’.
en.sarwar: 17. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the words of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, ‘. . . If you pay it privately to the needy, it is better for you. . . .’ [2:273], has said, ‘This payment is a payment other than compulsory zakat which is paid publicly and not privately.’”
